trigger_condition: localStorage.getItem throws SecurityError in privacy mode
guard_snippet: try { const stored = localStorage.getItem('sidebar-width'); ... } catch (e) { /* Private browsing */ }
potential_consequence: Layout component crashes on mount in Safari private/iframe mode

guard_snippet: try { localStorage.setItem('sidebar-width', String(savedWidth.value)); } catch (e) { /* Storage full — silently discard */ }
potential_consequence: Unhandled exception on unmount in storage-full scenario

guard_snippet: const parsed = parseInt(stored, 10); if (!isNaN(parsed) && parsed >= 160 && parsed <= 420) { sidebarWidth.value = parsed; }
potential_consequence: NaN guard catches this currently (NaN >= 160 is false) — actually handled, discard

trigger_condition: Escape-press during sidebar drag leaves isDragging=true
potential_consequence: pointer-events: none on layout makes all UI unclickable until mouseup

guard_snippet: ensureStartingSlash('') → '/', but no '/'-keyed sidebar entry exists from vitepress-sidebar — cfg['/'] is undefined
potential_consequence: sidebar returns [] on root page, no nav shown despite content having headings

trigger_condition: sub.link is undefined — vitepress-sidebar generates category items without links
guard_snippet: :href="sub.link ? withBase(sub.link) : ''" or use <span> when no link
potential_consequence: href="undefined" — broken link rendered for category-only sidebar items

trigger_condition: Multiple tabs open — last-onUnmounted overwrites earlier tab's user-preferred width
guard_snippet: Use BroadcastChannel or debounce writes per-tab independently
potential_consequence: User prefers 260px in tab A, resizes to 180px in tab B — tab A's unmount restores 260px

trigger_condition: prefers-reduced-motion: reduce disables scanline but color reduction not handled
potential_consequence: Scanline remnants clipped but CSS gradient still composited — negligible perf, not actionable
